title: Star Wars: Jedi vs. Sith
content:
{{Top|rwm|old|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Jedi vs. Sith}} {{ComicSeries |image=[[JvSTPBcover.jpg ]] |title=''Star Wars: Jedi vs. Sith'' |writer=[[Darko Macan]] |penciller=[[Ramón F. Bachs]] |inker=[[Raul Fernandez]] |letterer=[[Steve Dutro]] |colorist=[[Chris Blythe]] |cover artist=[[Andrew Robinson]] |editor=[[David Land|Dave Land]] |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |start date=[[April 18]], [[2001]]{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/99-222/Star-Wars-Jedi-vs-Sith-1-of-6|text=Star Wars: Jedi vs. Sith #1 (of 6)}} |end date=[[September 19]], [[2001]]{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/99-239/Star-Wars-Jedi-vs-Sith-6-of-6|text=Star Wars: Jedi vs. Sith #6 (of 6)}} |schedule=Monthly |format=Completed |issues=6 |timeline=[[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]]''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars: Jedi vs. Sith''''' was a series of comics published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] from [[April 18]], [[2001]] to [[September 19]], 2001, then compiled as a trade paperback on [[May 1]], [[2002]]. It tells the story of the end of the [[New Sith Wars]], the [[Ruusan campaign|Battle of Ruusan]], and how the [[Rule of Two/Legends|Rule of Two]] came into fruition. The comic also serves to explain the origins of the [[Valley of the Jedi]] seen in [[The Dark Forces Saga]], [[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II]], and [[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]] The series was re-released under the 30th Anniversary hardcover banner. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: Jedi vs. Sith}} ===Issues=== {| {{Prettytable}} ! colspan="4" |Color code key: |- |style="background-color:#FFBB60;" align="center" width="15%" |Collected (TPB) issue |style="background-color:#40CC40;" align="center" width="15%" |Released issue |style="background-color:#FFFF80;" align="center" width="15%" |Future issue |} {| {{Prettytable}} !
